meaning: vt.<英>(为表示不予承认、不予保护等)撤销...的注册,从登记簿上注销:
examples: If you delete an AMI, don't forget to ec2-deregister it.
After the verification, the customs will deregister the handbook and subsequently refund the money.
The administrator role is required for you to register or deregister a base node with the administrative agent.
